ddls:
CREATE TABLE "political_figures" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the political figure */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the political figure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the political figure */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the political figure */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the political figure */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status at the end of the term */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the political figure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_figures_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the term record */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political figure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term in days */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office held by the political figure during the term */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the political figure during the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political figure involved */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the election event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., election, resignation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., won, lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_events_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the database */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the database */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the affiliation */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political figure */,
  "party" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_party_affiliations_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("id")
)
